title: Thus far I’ve taken the Apple approach (inaction) with openclaw Haven’t dug into it while the dust settles @MatthewBerman do I go straight to openclaw? Or one of the many derivatives? Ex: nanoclaw

content.summary: Thus far I’ve taken the Apple approach (inaction) with openclaw Haven’t dug into it while the dust settles @MatthewBerman do I go straight to openclaw? Or one of the many derivatives? Ex: nanoclaw gabriel (@gabriel1) i was skeptical of the openclaw concept first, but turned out i was just stupid very visionary product. perfectly predicted and made it obvious how having access EVERYTHING from ANYWHERE to do ANY work is clearly how the world will run very soon — https://nitter.net/gabriel1/status/2035048113099219134#m
